TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Adama_Barrow, title = Adama_Barrow, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Adama_Barrow} }

S.FORM: == Adama Barrow == ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 2, Adama Barrow, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1965) mrhuw Gambia ta' misuw hya' ga Adama Barrow, aring ryax tay 19 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2017 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. pinqbaqan nya Adama Barrow mqwas biru sa Koba Kunda pqwasan biru laqi cikuy. Adama Barrow mqwas biru sa Crab Island pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas, Banjul. qnxan nya Adama Barrow maki msqun ki Fatoumatta Bah, ki Sarjo Mballow, tehuk misuw qani. Fatoumatta Bah ga, kneril ni Adama Barrow. Sarjo Mballow ga, kneril ni Adama Barrow. Haro' ga, la'iy ni Adama Barrow. mintzyuwaw nya Adama Barrow hiya ga m'sezi. maki sa kawas 2016, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

== Adama Barrow == ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 2, Adama Barrow, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1965) mrhuw Gambia ta' misuw hya' ga Adama Barrow, aring ryax tay 19 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2017 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. pinqbaqan nya Adama Barrow mqwas biru sa Koba Kunda pqwasan biru laqi cikuy. Adama Barrow mqwas biru sa Crab Island pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas, Banjul. qnxan nya Adama Barrow maki msqun ki Fatoumatta Bah, ki Sarjo Mballow, tehuk misuw qani. Fatoumatta Bah ga, kneril ni Adama Barrow. Sarjo Mballow ga, kneril ni Adama Barrow. Haro' ga, la'iy ni Adama Barrow. mintzyuwaw nya Adama Barrow hiya ga m'sezi. maki sa kawas 2016, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

(minД§tuw s~Й•a kawas~Й• taj ****) mrД§uw ЙЈamОІia taК” mis~Й•uw Д§jaК” ЙЈa a*ama ОІarrow, ariЕ‹ rjax taj ** s~Й•qu ОІjaК¦~КЁiЕ‹ taj * s~Й•a kawas~Й• **** lЙЈa, mus~Й•aК” s~Й•pazjaЕ‹ ОІalaj ms~Й•К”rux kja la. pinqОІaqan nja a*ama ОІarrow mqwas~Й• ОІiru s~Й•a koОІa kun*a pqwas~Й•an ОІiru laqi К¦~КЁikuj. a*ama ОІarrow mqwas~Й• ОІiru s~Й•a К¦~КЁraОІ is~Й•lan* pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” mrkjas~Й•, ОІanjul. qnxan nja a*ama ОІarrow maki ms~Й•qun ki *atoumatta ОІaД§, ki s~Й•arjo mОІallow, teД§uk mis~Й•uw qani. *atoumatta ОІaД§ ЙЈa, kneril ni a*ama ОІarrow. s~Й•arjo mОІallow ЙЈa, kneril ni a*ama ОІarrow. Д§aroК” ЙЈa, laК”ij ni a*ama ОІarrow. mintzjuwaw nja a*ama ОІarrow Д§ija ЙЈa mК”s~Й•ezi. maki s~Й•a kawas~Й• ****, tК”ariЕ‹ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~Й•ezi. К¦~КЁinkД§ulan s~Й•a knitaК” s~Й•a ОІrОІiruК”
